title: HMCTS management information - December 2024
body: "These documents provide the latest management information on workload and timeliness for the period from December 2023 to December 2024 for our civil and family courts, and tribunals. Within the release there are additional tables covering the workload of the Probate service.               HMCTS management information (accessible version) - December 2023 to December 2024    CSV, 7 KB  View online                   HMCTS management information - December 2023 to December 2024    ODS, 28.7 KB     This file is in an OpenDocument format  This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email hmctsforms@justice.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.     "
